label: Business Podcast
description: Frame the episode around decisions, clarity, and measurable outcomes without losing momentum.
bestFor: B2B shows, strategic breakdowns, and executive-facing content.
promptHint: Stay precise, outcome-focused, and decision-oriented. Avoid filler and keep the structure high signal.
exampleTitle: Why Most B2B Podcasts Stall Before They Create Revenue Momentum
exampleDescription: Break down one business problem, replace weak assumptions with a stronger model, and end with a next decision.
